changes.reason: STALE_0DTE breakout fallback is the weakest live slice: 2 trades, only $71 PnL, 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE. A one-step slope tighten tests whether stale fallback should require stronger ES-only continuation without touching VALID_0DTE profiles.

The stale breakout fallback is low-efficiency exposure with small realized payoff; reducing the fixed TP from 3 to 2.5 should favor faster realization in missing/stale option states while leaving option-confirmed routes unchanged.

Current breakout_no_0dte dynamic cap is 6 and stale trades show long holds with mediocre MFE-to-time quality. Compressing the adaptive cap to 4 limits stale fallback target inflation without using a stop loss or broad entry veto.

expected_effect: Should improve no-0DTE fallback exposure efficiency and reduce stale fallback heat/hold time. Main risk is losing the single high-quality EXPIRED_0DTE breakout winner or cutting fallback convexity; reject if total net profit drops more than 2%, VALID_0DTE changes, or fallback PnL/exposure fails to improve.
label: stale-no-0dte-breakout-compression
rationale: Use Batch G only and keep the experiment isolated to the routed no-0DTE breakout fallback. The core VALID_0DTE engines remain strong and should be protected, while stale fallback contributes little PnL and carries inefficient exposure. This avoids repeating the failed 1DTE tightening path and avoids global extended-VWAP/veto tightening after the RSI-boundary probe hurt score and net profit.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: breakout_long_no_0dte in STALE_0DTE produced only 2 trades, $71 PnL, 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE, while VALID_0DTE profiles produced $5388.1 and should not be touched.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Stale No-0DTE Breakout Efficiency Trim
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Very small stale/expired sample; stricter slope and lower targets may remove or underpay fallback insurance, especially the one EXPIRED_0DTE winner with strong efficiency.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE map stale/expired and router selects breakout_long_no_0dte as ES-only fallback.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Fallback PnL/exposure improves, fallback worst MAE does not worsen, VALID_0DTE PnL/trade count are unchanged, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_029, and slow_12h stays zero.
